emails.subject: Wellstar
emails.body: Theresa has changed the price to "less $.70" and suggested I insert meter numbers rather than well names. Pending further changes I will send to Wellstar. dp Debra Perlingiere Enron North America Corp. Legal Department 1400 Smith Street, EB 3885 Houston, Texas 77002 dperlin@enron.com Phone 713-853-7658 Fax 713-646-3490
